description: VoiceIsolate Pro ONNX model registry — all models execute locally via onnxruntime-web (WebGPU → WASM fallback). NO cloud inference. Models are fetched once on first run from same-origin /app/models/* paths (served by Vercel directly or proxied to Vercel Blob via vercel.json rewrites) and stored in the browser Cache API by model-loader.js. See MODELS.md for the upload → rewrite flow.

models.purpose: Voice Activity Detection — gates the pipeline before heavy ML stages
RNNoise — lightweight broadband noise suppressor, always-on stage 1
models.notes: Same-origin path. Vercel either serves a committed file or rewrites to Vercel Blob (configure rewrite in vercel.json after running scripts/upload_models_to_vercel_blob.py).

models.purpose: Hybrid Demucs v4 — primary vocals / accompaniment source separation
models.notes: Same-origin path. Run scripts/upload_models_to_vercel_blob.py to push the file to Vercel Blob, then add a /app/models/demucs_v4_quantized.onnx rewrite in vercel.json pointing at the returned Blob URL.

models.purpose: Band-Split RNN — secondary vocals extractor used in Creator/Forensic mode
models.notes: Same-origin path. Export to ONNX via the export script then upload to Vercel Blob using scripts/upload_models_to_vercel_blob.py. Until then, model-loader.js degrades gracefully to Demucs-only separation.

delivery_notes: silero_vad.onnx is committed to the repo and served directly by Vercel from public/app/models/.

rnnoise_suppressor.onnx, demucs_v4_quantized.onnx, and bsrnn_vocals.onnx are fetched on first run from the same-origin path /app/models/<filename>. Vercel either serves a committed file (if present in public/app/models/) or — for files too large for git — rewrites the path to a Vercel Blob URL declared in vercel.json.
Upload procedure: run scripts/upload_models_to_vercel_blob.py for each .onnx file, then add the returned Blob URL to vercel.json rewrites. See MODELS.md.
After first run all models are served from Cache API (vip-models-v1) — zero network on repeat visits.
The service worker (sw.js) intercepts /app/models/*.onnx fetches and returns the cached binary to ml-worker.js.
100% local processing guarantee preserved — no audio data or model weights leave the browser; all fetches are same-origin.

model_loader_behavior.download_ui: Show progress modal with per-model MB progress bar. Demucs download (83MB) must show estimated time. Do not block UI thread during fetch.
model_loader_behavior.integrity_check: sha256 field — leave empty to skip check, populate after upload to enable.
